response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: For 'HIT ME UP', the lyrics match the provided reference perfectly. For 'Kitsune no Mado' and 'Ifuudoudou', no reference lyrics were available, so I performed 100% manual transcription and translation. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized the reference for the latter part of the video and manual perception for the first 4 minutes. 3. Timing & Pacing: Anchored timing strictly to vocal activations. Applied aggressive truncation for the rapid speech in 'Ifuudoudou' and 'HIT ME UP' to prevent cascading delays. Subtitled prominent on-screen titles and credits during vocal silences.

subtitles.original: 【キツネノマド (Queen Fox)】
subtitles.english: [Title: Queen Fox]

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 変身してラバー 僕を見ておくれ ライライライライヤ
subtitles.english:
Transform and be my lover, look at me
Lai lai lai lai ya

subtitles.original: 朱色、青、ラバー 存在の上 ナイナイナイナイヤ
subtitles.english:
Vermilion, blue, lover, above existence
Nai nai nai nai ya

subtitles.original: Don't worry 傷つけないよ ライライライライヤ
subtitles.english:
Don't worry, I won't hurt you
Lai lai lai lai ya

subtitles.original: あっち、こっち、ミステリー アイアイアイアイヤ
subtitles.english:
Here, there, mystery
Ai ai ai ai ya

subtitles.original: あっち、そっち、身も闇 アイアイアイアイヤ
subtitles.english:
Here, there, body and darkness
Ai ai ai ai ya

subtitles.original: This finger trap!
subtitles.english: This finger trap!

subtitles.original: Just shout out the spell!
subtitles.english: Just shout out the spell!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Be the Queen Fox!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Be the Queen Fox!

subtitles.original:
【威風堂々】
Lyrics, Music: 梅とら
subtitles.english:
[Title: Ifuudoudou]
[Lyrics, Music: Umetora]

subtitles.original: 時に噛んだりして 痛みを覚えさせて
subtitles.english:
Sometimes biting,
making you remember the pain.

subtitles.original: 溢れる液体で汚してよ 全部
subtitles.english: Dirty me with overflowing liquid, all of it.

subtitles.original: 足の先からずっと 馳せせたその神経はもう
subtitles.english:
All the way from the tips of my toes,
those nerves I've quickened are already...

subtitles.original: 感触に溺れる身体 心を連れて
subtitles.english:
...my body drowning in the sensation,
taking my heart with it.

subtitles.original: Oh, oh, 指くわえた我慢の中
subtitles.english: Oh, oh, amidst the finger-sucking endurance

subtitles.original: Oh, oh, 欲して逃がしそう
subtitles.english: Oh, oh, wanting it, almost letting it escape.

subtitles.original:
いらない 全てはいらない
磨き上げてる 邪魔なプライド
subtitles.english:
No need, I don't need anything,
this polished, bothersome pride.

subtitles.original:
意味ない 世界のルール
くらいだとしか言いようがない
subtitles.english:
Meaningless world rules,
I can only say they're dark.

subtitles.original:
隠しているあなたのスタイル
剥き出しにあるがままのダイス
subtitles.english:
Your hidden style,
the dice exposed as they are.

subtitles.original:
そこに生まれるのは 期待外れなんかじゃない
叩きのめすマインド
subtitles.english:
What's born there isn't some disappointment,
it's a mind to beat down.

subtitles.original: 吐息合わせた相性 耳に吹きかける感情
subtitles.english:
Compatibility with matched breaths,
emotions blown into ears.

subtitles.original: 破裂しそうな胸 騒ぎ出すサイン
subtitles.english: A chest about to burst, a sign that starts to stir.

subtitles.original: 脱ぎかけてるシャツ 優しく裂いてよまず
subtitles.english:
A shirt halfway off,
first, gently tear it.

subtitles.original: かまわず Get blind もがいたまらないで
subtitles.english: Don't mind, get blind, don't stop struggling.

subtitles.original: Ah, ah, 自由な世界のど真ん中
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, right in the middle of a free world

subtitles.original: Ah, ah, 夢見てるのさ本性を
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, I'm dreaming of my true nature

subtitles.original:
いらない 全てはいらない
怖じ気づいた野望のトライ
subtitles.english:
No need, I don't need anything,
the trial of a cowed ambition.

subtitles.original: 満足なんてそこにない 目に見える哀れな未来
subtitles.english:
There's no satisfaction there,
the pitiful future you can see.

subtitles.original: 思い通りにできるライフ 手にできるわ あなた次第
subtitles.english:
A life you can live as you wish,
you can have it, it's up to you.

subtitles.original:
隠したりなんかはしない
誰よりも誇らしげにできるマインド
subtitles.english:
I won't hide anything,
a mind that can be prouder than anyone else's.

subtitles.original: ほらこの世界の中 他にはない
subtitles.english:
Look, in this world,
there's nothing else.

subtitles.original: 確かなもの 自分以外は
subtitles.english: Anything certain, other than myself.

subtitles.original: Shut up and keep time, I got no time, alright?
subtitles.english: Shut up and keep time, I got no time, alright?

subtitles.original: Don't get twitchy, go edgy, 全開で行っちゃ Burn, burn, burn!
subtitles.english:
Don't get twitchy, go edgy,
go at full throttle, burn, burn, burn!

subtitles.original: 欲しがってるのは 気持ちいいの もっと
subtitles.english: What you're wanting is to feel good, more.

subtitles.original: あるがままの想い 入れちゃって なりで Get
subtitles.english:
Put in your feelings as they are,
get it as it goes.

subtitles.original: ほらこの世界で今 解き放って
subtitles.english: Look, in this world now, release it.

subtitles.original: 鋭くギラつかせて 希望
subtitles.english: Make it sharp and glaring, hope.

subtitles.original: もっと本気出していいよ
subtitles.english: You can be more serious.

subtitles.original: OW!
subtitles.english: OW!
